aiAccelerators.metric: cumulative H100e share by chip designer

evidence.rawClaim: NVIDIA cumulative H100e-equivalent compute share through the dataset end date in Epoch AI chip sales data.
evidence.extraction: CR1 = maximum designer share in cumulative_timelines_by_designer.csv after normalizing designer names.
evidence.caveat: Tracks cumulative compute shipped, not current installed base or revenue share.

computeCloud.metric: US share of Max OP/s among Existing GPU clusters in Epoch dataset
computeCloud.note: Epoch dataset covers ~10-20% of global AI chip stock; geographic share is indicative, not exhaustive.

evidence.rawClaim: Sum of Max OP/s for Existing GPU clusters where Country contains United States.
evidence.extraction: topCountryShare = US Max OP/s divided by global Max OP/s total among Existing clusters in gpu_clusters.csv.
evidence.caveat: Epoch cluster inventory is partial; share is indicative, not exhaustive global cloud capacity.
